title: Gallery2 GalleryActivity FLAG_DISMISS_KEYGUARD via intent extra — lock screen bypass
notes: GalleryActivity reads boolean extra KEY_DISMISS_KEYGUARD ('dismiss-keyguard') from intent and sets FLAG_DISMISS_KEYGUARD on window. Exported activity accepting ACTION_VIEW from any app. FLAG_DISMISS_KEYGUARD deprecated API 26 but may still function on some devices. Gallery2 targets SDK 28. Also: CropActivity reads getShowWhenLocked() from CropExtras and sets FLAG_SHOW_WHEN_LOCKED over lock screen. NOTE: Gallery2 may not be present on Pixel 10 — needs verification.
